title: CoyneLabDuke/Rhesus-Macaque-Trophoblast-Organoids: Rhesus Macaque Trophoblast Organoid Scripts
author: Coyne Lab Duke University
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains code to analyze bulk, single cell, and single nuclei RNA sequencing data from rhesus macaque and human trophoblast organoids. This data is from the manuscript "Comparative analysis of rhesus macaque and human placental organoids highlights evolutionary differences in placentation".
steps_raw: This repository contains code to analyze bulk, single cell, and single nuclei RNA sequencing data from rhesus macaque and human trophoblast organoids. This data is from the manuscript "Comparative analysis of rhesus macaque and human placental organoids highlights evolutionary differences in placentation".
